title: Multi-Block Diffusion Language Models
innovation_summary: Multi-Block Diffusion Language Models: To bridge this gap, we propose Multi-Block Diffusion Language Models (MBD-LMs), obtained by post-training BD-LMs with Multi-block Teacher Forcing (MultiTF).
